examples: We had to wait in line at immigration.
The immigration officer checked my passport.
context: Hello everybody, a massive US immigration raid at a Hyundai construction site in Georgia resulted in the detention of about 475 workers.
Most of them, South Korean nationals, from September 2023 to September 2024, US immigration authorities deported about 46 South Korean nationals, less than 0.02% of the total.
